title: Lotononis pseudodelicata
taxonomy: Lotononis pseudodelicata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Lotononis, which is primarily native to southern Africa. The specific classification for Lotononis pseudodelicata includes the kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. The plant's classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other species. Further research on this species would provide more insight into its specific classification and characteristics.
